<content>1: # AgentCube Implementation Plan
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: This plan details all files to be created for Architectural Requirements AR-001 through AR-011, implementing a Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform for AI agents.
6: 
7: ---
8: 
9: ## AR-001: CI/CD Pipeline
10: 
11: ### GitHub Actions Workflows
12: 
13: #### File: `.github/workflows/main.yml`
14: **Purpose:** Pull request Docker build verification
15: **Logic:**
16: ```yaml
17: name: Agentcube CI Workflow
18: on:
19:   pull_request:
20:     branches: [main, release-*]
21: jobs:
22:   build:
23:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
24:     steps:
25:       - uses: actions/checkout@v3
26:       - name: Set up Docker Buildx
27:         uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v2
28:       - name: Verify Docker versions
29:         run: docker --version && docker buildx version
30:       - name: Build Docker image
31:         run: make docker-build
32: ```
33: 
34: #### File: `.github/workflows/e2e.yml`
35: **Purpose:** End-to-end testing on Kind
36: **Logic:**
37: - Triggers on PR to main/release-*
38: - Uses Go 1.23, installs Kind v0.30.0 via `helm/kind-action@v1` with `install_only: true`
39: - Sets `ARTIFACTS_PATH=${{ github.workspace }}/e2e-logs`
40: - Runs `make e2e`
41: - Uploads `e2e-logs/` on failure
42: - Always runs `make e2e-clean`
43: 
44: #### File: `.github/workflows/lint.yml`
45: **Purpose:** Go lint on changed code
46: **Logic:**
47: - Uses `dorny/paths-filter@v3` with filter `lint`: `**/*.go`, `go.mod`, `go.sum`, `.golangci.yml`, `.github/workflows/lint.yml`
48: - Uses Go 1.24
49: - Runs `make lint`
50: 
51: #### File: `.github/workflows/python-sdk-tests.yml`
52: **Purpose:** Python SDK unit tests
53: **Logic:**
54: - Uses paths-filter for `sdk-python/**`
55: - Python 3.12, working-directory: `sdk-python/`
56: - `pip install pytest`, `pip install -e .`
57: - `python -m pytest tests/ -v`
58: 
59: #### File: `.github/workflows/python-lint.yml`
60: **Purpose:** Python lint (Ruff)
61: **Logic:**
62: - Paths: `cmd/cli/**`, `sdk-python/**`, `example/**`, `test/**/*.py`, `pyproject.toml`, workflow file
63: - Python 3.10
64: - `pip install ruff`
65: - `python3 -m ruff check . --config pyproject.toml`
66: 
67: #### File: `.github/workflows/test-coverage.yml`
68: **Purpose:** Go test coverage with race detection
69: **Logic:**
70: - Paths filter `coverage` (broad glob excluding media/docs)
71: - Go 1.24, free disk space step
72: - `go test -race -v -coverprofile=coverage.out -coverpkg=./pkg/... ./pkg/...`
73: - Upload `coverage.out` artifact
74: - Optional Codecov upload with `secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN`
75: 
76: #### File: `.github/workflows/codegen-check.yml`
77: **Purpose:** Verify generated code is up to date
78: **Logic:**
79: - Paths: `pkg/apis/**`, `hack/**`, `.github/workflows/**`, `Makefile`
80: - Go 1.24.4
81: - `make gen-check` (runs `gen-all` then `git diff --exit-code`)
82: 
83: #### File: `.github/workflows/copyright-check.yml`
84: **Purpose:** Copyright header verification
85: **Logic:**
86: - Paths: all files except `*.md`, `*.svg`, `*.png`, `docs/**`, `.github/**`
87: - `apt install moreutils`
88: - `make gen-copyright`
89: - `git diff --exit-code`
90: 
91: #### File: `.github/workflows/codespell.yml`
92: **Purpose:** Spelling check
93: **Logic:**
94: - Backup/remove `pyproject.toml`, `package.json`, `package-lock.json`
95: - `pip install codespell`
96: - Run codespell with `--check-filenames`, skip globs, `--ignore-words-list fo,nam,te,notin,NotIn`
97: - Restore backed-up files
98: 
99: #### File: `.github/workflows/build-push-release.yml`
100: **Purpose:** Build and push multi-arch images
101: **Logic:**
102: - Triggers: push to main, push tags `v*.*.*`, `v*.*.*-*`
103: - Go 1.24.4, Docker Buildx
104: - Login to `ghcr.io` with `GITHUB_TOKEN`
105: - Set `TAG` from `github.ref_type` (tag or latest)
106: - Run `make docker-buildx-push`, `docker-buildx-push-router`, `docker-buildx-push-picod`
107: - Set `IMAGE_REGISTRY=ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}`
108: 
109: #### File: `.github/workflows/dify-plugin-publish.yml`
110: **Purpose:** Publish Dify plugin on tag
111: **Logic:**
112: - Trigger: push tags `dify-plugin/v*`
113: - Download dify-plugin CLI 0.0.6
114: - Install yq, read `manifest.yaml`
115: - Package plugin, checkout `author/dify-plugins` with token
116: - Create branch, commit, push, create PR to `langgenius/dify-plugins`
117: 
118: #### File: `.github/workflows/workflows-approve.yml`
119: **Purpose:** Auto-approve workflows for repeat contributors
120: **Logic:**
121: - `pull_request_target` on labeled/sync events
122: - Check if contributor has >1 PR or has `ok-to-test` label
123: - List `action_required` runs for head SHA
124: - Call `approveWorkflowRun` for each
125: 
126: ---
127: 
128: ## AR-002: Python SDK
129: 
130: ### Package Structure: `sdk-python/`
131: 
132: #### File: `sdk-python/pyproject.toml`
133: **Purpose:** Package metadata and dependencies
134: **Logic:**
135: ```toml
136: [project]
137: name = "agentcube-sdk"
138: version = "0.0.10"
139: requires-python = ">=3.10"
140: dependencies = ["requests", "PyJWT>=2.0.0", "cryptography"]
141: 
142: [build-system]
143: requires = ["setuptools>=61.0", "wheel"]
144: build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"
145: 
146: [tool.setuptools]
147: packages = ["agentcube", "agentcube.clients", "agentcube.utils"]
148: 
149: [project.scripts]
150: # No CLI entry for SDK
151: ```
152: 
153: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/__init__.py`
154: **Purpose:** Public exports
155: **Logic:**
156: ```python
157: from .code_interpreter import CodeInterpreterClient
158: from .agent_runtime import AgentRuntimeClient
159: 
160: __all__ = ["CodeInterpreterClient", "AgentRuntimeClient"]
161: __version__ = "0.0.10"
162: ```
163: 
164: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/exceptions.py`
165: **Purpose:** Exception hierarchy
166: **Logic:**
167: ```python
168: class AgentCubeError(Exception):
169:     """Base exception for AgentCube SDK"""
170:     pass
171: 
172: class CommandExecutionError(AgentCubeError):
173:     def __init__(self, exit_code, stderr, command=None):
174:         self.exit_code = exit_code
175:         self.stderr = stderr
176:         self.command = command
177:         super().__init__(f"Command failed (exit {exit_code}): {stderr}")
178: 
179: class SessionError(AgentCubeError):
180:     """Raised when session creation or management fails"""
181:     pass
182: 
183: class DataPlaneError(AgentCubeError):
184:     """Raised when Data Plane operations fail"""
185:     pass
186: ```
187: 
188: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/code_interpreter.py`
189: **Purpose:** CodeInterpreterClient main entry point
190: **Logic:**
191: - Constructor: accepts `name`, `namespace`, `ttl`, `workload_manager_url`, `router_url`, `auth_token`, `verbose`, `session_id`
192: - Resolves `router_url` from arg or `ROUTER_URL` env var (raises `ValueError` if missing)
193: - Creates `ControlPlaneClient` for workload manager communication
194: - If `session_id` provided: reuse; else call `create_session`
195: - Initialize `CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient` with session header
196: - Context manager: `__enter__` returns self; `__exit__` calls `stop()`
197: - `stop()`: closes data plane, deletes control plane session if owned, closes HTTP session
198: - `_init_data_plane()`: on failure after session create, log warning, delete session, re-raise
199: - `execute_command(command, timeout)`: delegate to data plane, raise `CommandExecutionError` on non-zero exit
200: - `run_code(language, code, timeout)`: for python/py/python3, write `.py` file and execute `python3 <file>`
201: - `write_file(content, remote_path)`, `upload_file(local_path, remote_path)`, `download_file(remote_path, local_path)`, `list_files(path)`: delegate to data plane
202: 
203: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/agent_runtime.py`
204: **Purpose:** AgentRuntimeClient
205: **Logic:**
206: - Constructor: `agent_name`, `namespace`, `router_url`, `verbose`, `session_id`, `timeout=120`, `connect_timeout=5.0`
207: - `__enter__` returns self; `__exit__` calls `close()`
208: - If `session_id` not provided: GET `{router}/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/agent-runtimes/{agent_name}/invocations/` to read `x-agentcube-session-id` header (raises `ValueError` if missing)
209: - `invoke(payload, timeout)`: POST JSON to base URL with session header; timeout tuple `(connect_timeout, self.timeout)`
210: - `close()`: close underlying `requests.Session`
211: 
212: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/clients/__init__.py`
213: **Purpose:** Re-export client classes
214: **Logic:**
215: ```python
216: from .control_plane import ControlPlaneClient
217: from .code_interpreter_data_plane import CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient
218: from .agent_runtime_data_plane import AgentRuntimeDataPlaneClient
219: 
220: __all__ = ["ControlPlaneClient", "CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient", "AgentRuntimeDataPlaneClient"]
221: ```
222: 
223: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/clients/control_plane.py`
224: **Purpose:** Workload Manager HTTP client
225: **Logic:**
226: - Constructor: `workload_manager_url` or `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL` env, `auth_token` or SA token file (`/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token`), `timeout=120`, `connect_timeout=5.0`, `pool_connections=10`, `pool_maxsize=10`
227: - Sets `Content-Type: application/json`, `Authorization: Bearer {token}` if token present
228: - `create_session(name, namespace, metadata, ttl)`: POST `{base_url}/v1/code-interpreter` with JSON body; return `data["sessionId"]` or raise `ValueError`
229: - `delete_session(session_id)`: DELETE `{base_url}/v1/code-interpreter/sessions/{session_id}`; return `True` on 404 or success, log and return `False` on other failures
230: - `close()`: close HTTP session
231: 
232: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/clients/code_interpreter_data_plane.py`
233: **Purpose:** Code Interpreter data plane client
234: **Logic:**
235: - Constructor: `session_id`, `router_url`, `namespace`, `cr_name`, `base_url` (or build from router_url+namespace+cr_name), `timeout=120`, `connect_timeout=5.0`, pool settings
236: - Base URL: `urljoin(router_url, "/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/code-interpreters/{cr_name}/invocations/")`
237: - Session header: `x-agentcube-session-id: {session_id}`
238: - `execute_command(command, timeout)`: POST `api/execute` with JSON `{"command": [...], "timeout": "<n>s"}`; read timeout = `timeout_value + 2.0`; raise `CommandExecutionError` on non-zero exit
239: - `write_file(content, remote_path)`: POST `api/files` with JSON `{"path", "content" (base64), "mode": "0644"}`
240: - `upload_file(local_path, remote_path)`: POST multipart to `api/files` with file and `x-agentcube-session-id` header
241: - `download_file(remote_path, local_path)`: GET `api/files/{path}` with `stream=True`, write to local
242: - `list_files(path)`: GET `api/files?path=...`
243: - `close()`: close HTTP session
244: 
245: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/clients/agent_runtime_data_plane.py`
246: **Purpose:** Agent Runtime data plane client
247: **Logic:**
248: - `SESSION_HEADER = "x-agentcube-session-id"`
249: - Constructor: `router_url`, `namespace`, `agent_name`, `timeout=120`, `connect_timeout=5.0`, pool settings
250: - Base URL: `urljoin(router_url, "/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/agent-runtimes/{agent_name}/invocations/")`
251: - `bootstrap_session_id()`: GET base URL, read `x-agentcube-session-id` header
252: - `invoke(session_id, payload, timeout)`: POST base URL with JSON payload, session header, `Content-Type: application/json`; timeout tuple
253: - `close()`: close HTTP session
254: 
255: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/utils/http.py`
256: **Purpose:** HTTP session factory
257: **Logic:**
258: ```python
259: import requests
260: from requests.adapters import HTTPAdapter
261: 
262: def create_session(pool_connections=10, pool_maxsize=10):
263:     session = requests.Session()
264:     adapter = HTTPAdapter(pool_connections=pool_connections, pool_maxsize=pool_maxsize)
265:     session.mount("http://", adapter)
266:     session.mount("https://", adapter)
267:     return session
268: ```
269: 
270: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/utils/utils.py`
271: **Purpose:** Utility functions
272: **Logic:**
273: ```python
274: def read_token_from_file(file_path):
275:     try:
276:         with open(file_path, 'r') as f:
277:             return f.read().strip()
278:     except FileNotFoundError:
279:         return ""
280: ```
281: 
282: #### File: `sdk-python/agentcube/utils/log.py`
283: **Purpose:** Logging utility
284: **Logic:**
285: ```python
286: import logging
287: 
288: def get_logger(name, level=logging.INFO):
289:     logger = logging.getLogger(name)
290:     logger.setLevel(level)
291:     return logger
292: ```
293: 
294: ---
295: 
296: ## AR-003: Deployment (Helm Chart, Dockerfiles, Makefile)
297: 
298: ### Helm Chart: `manifests/charts/base/`
299: 
300: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/Chart.yaml`
301: **Purpose:** Chart metadata
302: ```yaml
303: apiVersion: v1
304: name: agentcube
305: description: A Helm chart for AgentCube
306: version: 0.1.0
307: appVersion: 1.0.0
308: ```
309: 
310: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/values.yaml`
311: **Purpose:** Default configuration values
312: **Logic:**
313: - `imagePullSecrets: []`
314: - `redis.addr: ""`, `redis.password: ""`
315: - `router.replicas: 1`, `router.image.repository/tag/pullPolicy`, `router.service.type/port/targetPort`, `router.resources`, `router.config: {}`, `router.extraEnv: []`, `router.serviceAccountName: ""`, `router.rbac.create: false`
316: - `workloadmanager.replicas: 1`, `workloadmanager.image/repository/tag/pullPolicy`, `workloadmanager.service.type/port`, `workloadmanager.resources`, `workloadmanager.extraEnv: []`
317: - `volcano.scheduler.enabled: false`, `volcano.scheduler.replicas: 1`, `volcano.scheduler.image/repository/tag/pullPolicy`
318: 
319: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/templates/workloadmanager.yaml`
320: **Purpose:** Workload Manager Deployment + Service
321: **Logic:**
322: - Deployment: `replicas` from values, `serviceAccountName: workloadmanager`
323: - Container: image from values, port `http` at `workloadmanager.service.port`
324: - Env: `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` (fieldRef), `REDIS_PASSWORD`, `REDIS_ADDR`, `workloadmanager.extraEnv`
325: - Args: `--port={{ workloadmanager.service.port }}`, `--runtime-class-name=`
326: - Resources from values
327: - Liveness/Readiness: HTTP GET `/health` on service port, delays 10s/5s
328: - Service: `type`, `port` from values, selector `app: workloadmanager`
329: 
330: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/templates/agentcube-router.yaml`
331: **Purpose:** Router Deployment + Service
332: **Logic:**
333: - Deployment: `replicas`, conditional `serviceAccountName`
334: - Env: `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` (fieldRef), `REDIS_ADDR`, `REDIS_PASSWORD`, `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL=http://workloadmanager.{{.Release.Namespace}}.svc.cluster.local:{{port}}`, `router.extraEnv`
335: - Args: `--port={{ router.service.targetPort }}`, `--debug`
336: - Liveness `/health/live`, Readiness `/health/ready` on targetPort
337: - Service: ClusterIP, port/targetPort from values
338: 
339: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/templates/rbac/workloadmanager.yaml`
340: **Purpose:** RBAC for Workload Manager
341: **Logic:**
342: - ServiceAccount `workloadmanager` in release namespace
343: - ClusterRole `workloadmanager` with rules for: `agents.x-k8s.io/sandboxes`, `extensions.agents.x-k8s.io/sandboxclaims/sandboxtemplates/sandboxwarmpools`, `runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/codeinterpreters/agentruntimes`, `pods`, `tokenreviews`, `secrets`
344: - ClusterRoleBinding `workloadmanager` binding SA to ClusterRole
345: 
346: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/templates/rbac-router.yaml`
347: **Purpose:** Optional Router RBAC (conditional)
348: **Logic:**
349: - Rendered only if `router.rbac.create` is true
350: - ServiceAccount with name from `router.serviceAccountName` or default `agentcube-router`
351: - Role allowing `secrets` verbs in release namespace
352: - RoleBinding
353: 
354: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/templates/volcano-agent-scheduler-development.yaml`
355: **Purpose:** Optional Volcano agent scheduler (conditional)
356: **Logic:**
357: - Rendered only if `volcano.scheduler.enabled`
358: - ServiceAccount, ConfigMap, ClusterRole, ClusterRoleBinding, Service (port 8080 metrics), Deployment
359: - Deployment: image from values, args including `--scheduler-name=agent-scheduler`
360: 
361: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/crds/runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh_agentruntimes.yaml`
362: **Purpose:** AgentRuntime CRD
363: **Logic:**
364: - Group: `runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh`, Version: `v1alpha1`, Scope: Namespaced
365: - Spec: `targetPort` (array of TargetPort), required `podTemplate` (SandboxTemplate), `sessionTimeout` (default 15m), `maxSessionDuration` (default 8h)
366: - Status: optional `conditions`
367: - Print column: Age from creationTimestamp
368: 
369: #### File: `manifests/charts/base/crds/runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh_codeinterpreters.yaml`
370: **Purpose:** CodeInterpreter CRD
371: **Logic:**
372: - Group/Version/Scope same as AgentRuntime
373: - Spec: `ports`, required `template`, `sessionTimeout` (default 15m), `maxSessionDuration` (default 8h), `warmPoolSize`, `authMode` (enum picod/none, default picod)
374: - Status: `conditions`, `ready`
375: 
376: ### Dockerfiles: `docker/`
377: 
378: #### File: `docker/Dockerfile` (Workload Manager)
379: **Purpose:** Multi-stage Go build
380: **Logic:**
381: - Builder stage: `golang:1.24.9-alpine`, copy `go.mod/go.sum`, `go mod download`, copy `cmd/pkg`, build `CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=$TARGETARCH go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o workloadmanager ./cmd/workload-manager`
382: - Runtime stage: `alpine:3.19`, add ca-certificates, create user `apiserver` UID 1000, copy binary, expose 8080, entrypoint `/app/workloadmanager`, default args `--port=8080`
383: 
384: #### File: `docker/Dockerfile.router`
385: **Purpose:** Router image
386: **Logic:**
387: - Same builder pattern, copies `client-go/` additionally
388: - Output binary `agentcube-router` from `./cmd/router`
389: - Runtime user `router` UID 1000
390: - Default args `--port=8080 --debug`
391: 
392: #### File: `docker/Dockerfile.picod`
393: **Purpose:** PicoD image
394: **Logic:**
395: - Builder: `golang:1.24.4`, build `picod` from `./cmd/picod`
396: - Runtime: `ubuntu:24.04`, install `python3`, copy binary, runs as root
397: - Entrypoint `./picod`
398: 
399: ### Makefile
400: 
401: #### File: `Makefile`
402: **Purpose:** Build automation
403: **Key targets:**
404: - `all` → `build`
405: - `generate`: `controller-gen object` + `gen-crd` + `go mod tidy`
406: - `gen-crd`: generate CRDs to `manifests/charts/base/crds`

708: #### File: `pkg/router/config.go`
709: **Purpose:** Router configuration

724: #### File: `pkg/router/server.go`
725: **Purpose:** HTTP server and routes
726: **Logic:**
727: - `Server` struct: `config`, `engine` (Gin), `httpServer`, `sessionManager`, `storeClient`, `httpTransport`, `jwtManager`
728: - Route table:
729:   - `GET /health/live` → `handleHealthLive` (no middleware)
730:   - `GET /health/ready` → `handleHealthReady` (no middleware)
731:   - `GET|POST /v1/namespaces/:namespace/agent-runtimes/:name/invocations/*path` → `handleAgentInvoke` (logger, recovery, concurrency middleware)
732:   - `GET|POST /v1/namespaces/:namespace/code-interpreters/:name/invocations/*path` → `handleCodeInterpreterInvoke`
733: - Concurrency middleware: semaphore with capacity `MaxConcurrentRequests` (default 1000)
734: - HTTP server: `h2c` wrapping, `ReadTimeout 30s`, `IdleTimeout 90s`
735: 
736: #### File: `pkg/router/session_manager.go`
737: **Purpose:** Session resolution
738: **Logic:**
739: - `SessionManager` interface: `GetSandboxBySession(ctx, sessionID, namespace, name, kind)`
740: - `manager` struct: `storeClient`, `workloadMgrAddr`, `httpClient`
741: - Constructor: reads `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL` (required), creates HTTP client (timeout 2m, MaxIdleConnsPerHost 100, http2 config)
742: - `GetSandboxBySession`:
743:   - Empty session ID → POST to workload manager to create sandbox
744:   - Non-empty → load from store
745:   - Returns `NewSessionNotFoundError` on missing
746:   - Returns `NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError` on workload manager 404
747:

750: **Logic:**
751: - Constants: `rsaKeySize = 2048`, `jwtExpiration = 5m`, `IdentitySecretName = "picod-router-identity"`
752: - `JWTManager`: holds RSA key pair, k8s clientset
753: - `NewJWTManager()`: generates RSA key pair
754: - `GenerateToken(claims)`: creates JWT with `exp`, `iat`, `iss="agentcube-router"`, signs with RS256
755: - `TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret(ctx)`: creates or loads secret `picod-router-identity` in `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` or `default`
756:

761: - `forwardToSandbox`: determines upstream URL from EntryPoints (first match on path prefix, else first entry), builds reverse proxy, sets forwarding headers, injects JWT for Sandbox/SandboxClaim kinds
762: - Proxy error mapping: connection refused → 502, timeout → 504

775: ## AR-007: Idle Cleanup (Agentd)
776: 
777: ### Package: `pkg/agentd/`
778: 
779: #### File: `pkg/agentd/controller.go`
780: **Purpose:** Sandbox idle cleanup controller
781: **Logic:**
782: ```go
783: var SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute
784: 
785: type Reconciler struct {
786:     client.Client
787:     Scheme *runtime.Scheme
788: }
789: 
790: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {
791:     sandbox := &sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}
792:     if err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox); err != nil {
793:         if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
794:             return ctrl.Result{}, nil
795:         }
796:         return ctrl.Result{}, err
797:     }
798:     
799:     lastActivityStr, exists := sandbox.Annotations[workloadmanager.LastActivityAnnotationKey]
800:     if !exists || lastActivityStr == "" {
801:         return ctrl.Result{}, nil
802:     }
803:     
804:     lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
805:     if err != nil {
806:         return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, err
807:     }
808:     
809:     expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
810:     if time.Now().After(expirationTime) {
811:         if err := r.Delete(ctx, sandbox); err != nil && !errors.IsNotFound(err) {
812:             return ctrl.Result{}, err
813:         }
814:         return ctrl.Result{}, nil
815:     }
816:     
817:     return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: time.Until(expirationTime)}, nil
818: }
819: 
820: func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr ctrl.Manager) error {
821:     return ctrl.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).For(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}).Complete(r)
822: }
823: ```
824: 
825: #### File: `cmd/agentd/main.go`
826: **Purpose:** Agentd binary entry point
827: **Logic:**
828: - Registers scheme with core K8s types + `sandboxv1alpha1`
829: - Creates controller-runtime manager with `Metrics: {BindAddress: "0"}`, `HealthProbeBindAddress: "0"`
830: - Registers `Reconciler`
831: - Runs `mgr.Start(ctrl.SetupSignalHandler())`
832:

# AgentCube Implementation Plan

## Overview

This plan details all files to be created for Architectural Requirements AR-001 through AR-011, implementing a Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform for AI agents.

---

## AR-001: CI/CD Pipeline

### GitHub Actions Workflows

#### File: `.github/workflows/main.yml`
**Purpose:** Pull request Docker build verification
**Logic:**
```yaml
name: Agentcube CI Workflow
on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]

<path>/home/dsj/benchmark/workspaces/v2.0/opencode-cli_bailian-coding-plan_glm-5_20260322T151911Z/PLAN.md</path>

1427: 1. **AR-008**: CRDs and types (foundation for all components)
1428: 2. **AR-011**: client-go generated code (depends on AR-008)
1429: 3. **AR-010**: Session store (no dependencies)
1430: 4. **AR-007**: Idle cleanup (depends on store, agent-sandbox API)
1431: 5. **AR-009**: PicoD (standalone)
1432: 6. **AR-006**: Session routing (depends on store, JWT)
1433: 7. **AR-008 (cont.)**: Workload manager (depends on all above)
1434: 8. **AR-002**: Python SDK (depends on API contracts)
1435: 9. **AR-005**: CLI Toolkit (depends on Python SDK, K8s)
1436: 10. **AR-004**: Integrations (depends on Python SDK)

6: ## Purpose
7: 
8: AgentCube is a Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform for AI agents.
9: It provisions isolated sandbox pods on demand, routes HTTP traffic to them through
10: session-aware proxies, and manages their lifecycle (creation, expiry, idle cleanup).
11: 
12: ## Tech Stack
13: 
14: | Layer | Technology |
15: |-------|-----------|
16: | Language (server) | Go 1.24, module `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube` |
17: | Language (CLI/SDK) | Python ≥3.10 |
18: | HTTP framework | Gin (Go), Typer (Python CLI), FastAPI (example) |
19: | Kubernetes | CRDs (`runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/v1alpha1`), controller-runtime, `sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox` |
20: | Storage | Redis (go-redis/v9), Valkey (valkey-go) |
21: | Auth | JWT RS256 (golang-jwt/v5), K8s TokenReview |
22: | Packaging | Helm 3, multi-stage Docker, GitHub Actions CI/CD |
23: | Docs | Docusaurus 3.x |
24: 
25: ## Architecture
26: 
27: ```
28: Client / SDK / CLI
29:   → Router (Deployment :8080)
30:      ↔ Redis/Valkey (session store)
31:      → WorkloadManager (Service :8080)
32:         ↔ Redis/Valkey
33:         → K8s API: CRDs, Sandbox, Pod, Secret, TokenReview
34:   Sandbox Pods (with optional PicoD daemon)
35:   Agentd (idle cleanup controller)
36:   Optional: Volcano vc-agent-scheduler
37: ```
38: 
39: ## Conventions
40: 
41: - Go packages under `pkg/`, binaries under `cmd/`
42: - Python CLI at `cmd/cli/`, SDK at `sdk-python/`
43: - JSON tags use camelCase; Go structs use PascalCase
44: - K8s resources use `runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh` API group
45: - Normative language: SHALL = mandatory, SHOULD = recommended, MAY = optional

(End of file - total 45 lines)

# AgentCube — OpenSpec Project Context

> Source: [github.com/ShijunDeng/agentcube](https://github.com/ShijunDeng/agentcube)
> Generated: 2026-03-21 (from source tree reverse-engineering)

## Purpose

AgentCube is a Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform for AI agents.
It provisions isolated sandbox pods on demand, routes HTTP traffic to them through
session-aware proxies, and manages their lifecycle (creation, expiry, idle cleanup).

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Language (server) | Go 1.24, module `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube` |
| Language (CLI/SDK) | Python ≥3.10 |
| HTTP framework | Gin (Go), Typer (Python CLI), FastAPI (example) |
| Kubernetes | CRDs (`runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/v1alpha1`), controller-runtime, `sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox` |
| Storage | Redis (go-redis/v9), Valkey (valkey-go) |

name: Agentcube CI Workflow
on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v2
      - name: Verify Docker versions
        run: docker --version && docker buildx version
      - name: Build Docker image
        run: make docker-build

input.content:
name: E2E Tests
on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]
jobs:
  e2e:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.23'
      - uses: helm/kind-action@v1
        with:
          install_only: true
          version: v0.30.0
      - name: Run E2E tests
        env:
          ARTIFACTS_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e-logs
        run: make e2e
      - name: Upload E2E logs on failure
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: e2e-logs
          path: e2e-logs/
      - name: Cleanup E2E
        if: always()
        run: make e2e-clean

input.content:
name: Lint
on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]
jobs:
  lint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            lint:
              - '**/*.go'
              - 'go.mod'
              - 'go.sum'
              - '.golangci.yml'
              - '.github/workflows/lint.yml'
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        if: steps.filter.outputs.lint == 'true'
        with:
          go-version: '1.24'
      - name: Run lint
        if: steps.filter.outputs.lint == 'true'
        run: make lint

input.content:
name: Python SDK Tests
on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            sdk:
              - 'sdk-python/**'
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        if: steps.filter.outputs.sdk == 'true'
        with:
          python-version: '3.12'
      - name: Install dependencies
        if: steps.filter.outputs.sdk == 'true'
        working-directory: sdk-python/
        run: |
          pip install pytest
          pip install -e .
      - name: Run tests
        if: steps.filter.outputs.sdk == 'true'
        working-directory: sdk-python/
        run: python -m pytest tests/ -v

input.content:
name: Python Lint
on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]
jobs:
  lint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            python:
              - 'cmd/cli/**'
              - 'sdk-python/**'
              - 'example/**'
              - 'test/**/*.py'
              - 'pyproject.toml'
              - '.github/workflows/python-lint.yml'
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        if: steps.filter.outputs.python == 'true'
        with:
          python-version: '3.10'
      - name: Install ruff
        if: steps.filter.outputs.python == 'true'
        run: pip install ruff
      - name: Run ruff
        if: steps.filter.outputs.python == 'true'
        run: python3 -m ruff check . --config pyproject.toml

input.content:
name: Test Coverage
on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]
jobs:
  coverage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            coverage:
              - '**/*.go'
              - 'go.mod'
              - 'go.sum'
              - 'pkg/**'
              - 'cmd/**'
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        if: steps.filter.outputs.coverage == 'true'
        with:
          go-version: '1.24'
      - name: Free disk space
        if: steps.filter.outputs.coverage == 'true'
        run: |
          sudo rm -rf /usr/share/dotnet
          sudo rm -rf /opt/ghc
          sudo rm -rf /usr/local/share/boost
          sudo apt clean
          df -h
      - name: Run tests with coverage
        if: steps.filter.outputs.coverage == 'true'
        run: go test -race -v -coverprofile=coverage.out -coverpkg=./pkg/... ./pkg/...
      - name: Upload coverage artifact
        if: steps.filter.outputs.coverage == 'true'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage
          path: coverage.out
      - name: Upload to Codecov
        if: steps.filter.outputs.coverage == 'true' && github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
          files: coverage.out

input.content:
name: Codegen Check
on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]
jobs:
  codegen:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            codegen:
              - 'pkg/apis/**'
              - 'hack/**'
              - '.github/workflows/**'
              - 'Makefile'
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        if: steps.filter.outputs.codegen == 'true'
        with:
          go-version: '1.24.4'
      - name: Check generated code
        if: steps.filter.outputs.codegen == 'true'
        run: make gen-check

input.content:
name: Copyright Check
on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]
jobs:
  copyright:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            copyright:
              - '**/*.go'
              - '**/*.py'
              - '**/*.sh'
              - '**/*.yaml'
              - '**/*.yml'
              - '!**/*.md'
              - '!**/*.svg'
              - '!**/*.png'
              - '!docs/**'
              - '!.github/**'
      - name: Install moreutils
        if: steps.filter.outputs.copyright == 'true'
        run: sudo apt install -y moreutils
      - name: Check copyright headers
        if: steps.filter.outputs.copyright == 'true'
        run: |
          make gen-copyright
          git diff --exit-code

input.content:
name: Codespell
on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, release-*]
jobs:
  codespell:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.10'
      - name: Backup config files
        run: |
          cp pyproject.toml pyproject.toml.bak || true
          cp package.json package.json.bak || true
          cp package-lock.json package-lock.json.bak || true
          rm -f pyproject.toml package.json package-lock.json || true
      - name: Install codespell
        run: pip install codespell
      - name: Run codespell
        run: |
          codespell --check-filenames \
            --skip '*.git,*.svg,*.png,*.lock,*.sum,go.mod,go.sum,*_test.go,*.md,.github,Dockerfile,*generated*,*.pyc' \
            --ignore-words-list fo,nam,te,notin,NotIn
      - name: Restore config files
        if: always()
        run: |
          mv pyproject.toml.bak pyproject.toml || true
          mv package.json.bak package.json || true
          mv package-lock.json.bak package-lock.json || true

input.content:
name: Build and Push Release
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    tags:
      - 'v*.*.*'
      - 'v*.*.*-*'
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.24.4'
      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v2
      - name: Login to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Set image tag
        id: tag
        run: |
          if [ "${{ github.ref_type }}" = "tag" ]; then
            echo "TAG=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "TAG=latest" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi
      - name: Set registry
        id: registry
        run: echo "REGISTRY=ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      - name: Build and push workload manager
        run: |
          IMAGE_REGISTRY=${{ steps.registry.outputs.REGISTRY }} \
          TAG=${{ steps.tag.outputs.TAG }} \
          make docker-buildx-push
      - name: Build and push router
        run: |
          IMAGE_REGISTRY=${{ steps.registry.outputs.REGISTRY }} \
          TAG=${{ steps.tag.outputs.TAG }} \
          make docker-buildx-push-router
      - name: Build and push picod
        run: |
          IMAGE_REGISTRY=${{ steps.registry.outputs.REGISTRY }} \
          TAG=${{ steps.tag.outputs.TAG }} \
          make docker-buildx-push-picod

input.content:
name: Publish Dify Plugin
on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'dify-plugin/v*'
jobs:
  publish:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Download dify-plugin CLI
        run: |
          curl -L -o dify-plugin https://github.com/langgenius/dify-plugin/releases/download/0.0.6/dify-plugin-linux-amd64
          chmod +x dify-plugin
      - name: Install yq
        run: |
          curl -L -o yq https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/download/v4.35.1/yq_linux_amd64
          chmod +x yq
          sudo mv yq /usr/local/bin/
      - name: Read manifest
        id: manifest
        working-directory: integrations/dify-plugin
        run: |
          VERSION=$(yq '.version' manifest.yaml)
          AUTHOR=$(yq '.author' manifest.yaml)
          NAME=$(yq '.name' manifest.yaml)
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "author=$AUTHOR" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "name=$NAME" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      - name: Package plugin
        working-directory: integrations/dify-plugin
        run: |
          zip -r ../${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }}.zip .
      - name: Checkout dify-plugins
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
        with:
          repository: ${{ steps.manifest.outputs.author }}/dify-plugins
          token: ${{ secrets.DIFY_PLUGINS_TOKEN }}
          path: dify-plugins
      - name: Create branch and commit
        working-directory: dify-plugins
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git checkout -b ${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }}-${{ steps.manifest.outputs.version }}
          mkdir -p plugins/${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }}
          cp ../integrations/${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }}.zip plugins/${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }}/
          git add .
          git commit -m "Add ${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }} v${{ steps.manifest.outputs.version }}"
          git push origin ${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }}-${{ steps.manifest.outputs.version }}
      - name: Create PR
        working-directory: dify-plugins
        run: |
          gh pr create \
            --title "Add ${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }} v${{ steps.manifest.outputs.version }}" \
            --body "Automated PR to publish ${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }} v${{ steps.manifest.outputs.version }}" \
            --base main \
            --head ${{ steps.manifest.outputs.author }}:${{ steps.manifest.outputs.name }}-${{ steps.manifest.outputs.version }} \
            --repo langgenius/dify-plugins
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DIFY_PLUGINS_TOKEN }}

input.content:
imagePullSecrets: []

redis:
  addr: ""
  password: ""

router:
  replicas: 1
  image:
    repository: agentcube-router
    tag: latest
    pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  service:
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: 100m
      memory: 128Mi
    limits:
      cpu: 500m
      memory: 512Mi
  config: {}
  extraEnv: []
  serviceAccountName: ""
  rbac:
    create: false

workloadmanager:
  replicas: 1
  image:
    repository: workloadmanager
    tag: latest
    pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  service:
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 8080
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: 100m
      memory: 128Mi
    limits:
      cpu: 500m
      memory: 512Mi
  extraEnv: []

volcano:
  scheduler:
    enabled: false
    replicas: 1
    image:
      repository: agent-scheduler
      tag: latest
      pullPolicy: IfNotPresent

input.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: workloadmanager
  labels:
    app: workloadmanager
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.replicas }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: workloadmanager
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: workloadmanager
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: workloadmanager
      containers:
        - name: workloadmanager

input.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: agentcube-router
  labels:
    app: agentcube-router
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.router.replicas }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: agentcube-router
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: agentcube-router
    spec:
      {{- if .Values.router.serviceAccountName }}
      serviceAccountName: {{ .Values.router.serviceAccountName }}
      {{- end }}
      containers:
        - name: router
          image: "{{ .Values.router.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.router.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.router.image.pullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.router.service.targetPort }}
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.namespace
            - name: REDIS_ADDR
              value: {{ .Values.redis.addr }}
            - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
              value: {{ .Values.redis.password }}
            - name: WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL
              value: "http://workloadmanager.{{ .Release.Namespace }}.svc.cluster.local:{{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.port }}"
          {{- with .Values.router.extraEnv }}
          {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          args:
            - --port={{ .Values.router.service.targetPort }}
            - --debug
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.router.resources | nindent 12 }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/live
              port: {{ .Values.router.service.targetPort }}
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/ready
              port: {{ .Values.router.service.targetPort }}
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: agentcube-router
  labels:
    app: agentcube-router
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.router.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.router.service.port }}
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    app: agentcube-router

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: workloadmanager
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: workloadmanager
rules:
  - apiGroups:
      - agents.x-k8s.io
    resources:
      - sandboxes
    verbs:
      - get
      - list
      - watch
      - create
      - update
      - patch
      - delete
  - apiGroups:
      - extensions.agents.x-k8s.io
    resources:
      - sandboxclaims
      - sandboxtemplates
      - sandboxwarmpools
    verbs:
      - get
      - list

input.content:
{{- if .Values.router.rbac.create }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.router.serviceAccountName | default "agentcube-router" }}
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: agentcube-router
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
rules:
  - apiGroups:
      - ""
    resources:
      - secrets
    verbs:
      - get
      - list
      - watch
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: agentcube-router
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: Role
  name: agentcube-router
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: {{ .Values.router.serviceAccountName | default "agentcube-router" }}
    namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
{{- end }}

input.content:
{{- if .Values.volcano.scheduler.enabled }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: agent-scheduler
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: agent-scheduler-config
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
data:
  scheduler-config.yaml: |
    apiVersion: kubescheduler.config.k8s.io/v1
    kind: KubeSchedulerConfiguration
    profiles:
      - schedulerName: agent-scheduler
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: agent-scheduler
rules:
  - apiGroups:
      - ""
    resources:
      - pods
      - nodes
    verbs:
      - get
      - list
      - watch
  - apiGroups:
      - ""
    resources:
      - binding
      - pods/binding
    verbs:
      - create
  - apiGroups:
      - scheduling.k8s.io
    resources:
      - priorityclasses
    verbs:
      - get
      - list
      - watch
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: agent-scheduler
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: agent-scheduler
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: agent-scheduler
    namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: agent-scheduler
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
spec:
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      name: metrics
  selector:
    app: agent-scheduler
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: agent-scheduler
  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
  labels:
    app: agent-scheduler
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.volcano.scheduler.replicas }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: agent-scheduler
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: agent-scheduler
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: agent-scheduler
      containers:
        - name: scheduler
          image: "{{ .Values.volcano.scheduler.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.volcano.scheduler.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.volcano.scheduler.image.pullPolicy }}
          args:
            - --scheduler-name=agent-scheduler
            - --config=/config/scheduler-config.yaml
          volumeMounts:
            - name: config
              mountPath: /config
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: metrics
      volumes:
        - name: config
          configMap:
            name: agent-scheduler-config
{{- end }}

input.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: workloadmanager
  labels:
    app: workloadmanager
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.replicas }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: workloadmanager
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: workloadmanager
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: workloadmanager
      containers:
        - name: workloadmanager
          image: "{{ .Values.workloadmanager.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.workloadmanager.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.image.pullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.port }}
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.namespace
            - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
              value: "{{ .Values.redis.password }}"
            - name: REDIS_ADDR
              value: "{{ .Values.redis.addr }}"
{{- with .Values.workloadmanager.extraEnv }}
{{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
{{- end }}
          args:
            - --port={{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.port }}
            - --runtime-class-name=
          resources:
{{- toYaml .Values.workloadmanager.resources | nindent 12 }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.port }}
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.port }}
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: workloadmanager
  labels:
    app: workloadmanager
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.port }}
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    app: workloadmanager

input.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: agentcube-router
  labels:
    app: agentcube-router
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.router.replicas }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: agentcube-router
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: agentcube-router
    spec:
{{- if .Values.router.serviceAccountName }}
      serviceAccountName: {{ .Values.router.serviceAccountName }}
{{- end }}
      containers:
        - name: router
          image: "{{ .Values.router.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.router.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.router.image.pullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.router.service.targetPort }}
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.namespace
            - name: REDIS_ADDR
              value: "{{ .Values.redis.addr }}"
            - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
              value: "{{ .Values.redis.password }}"
            - name: WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL
              value: "http://workloadmanager.{{ .Release.Namespace }}.svc.cluster.local:{{ .Values.workloadmanager.service.port }}"
{{- with .Values.router.extraEnv }}
{{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
{{- end }}
          args:
            - --port={{ .Values.router.service.targetPort }}
            - --debug
          resources:
{{- toYaml .Values.router.resources | nindent 12 }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/live
              port: {{ .Values.router.service.targetPort }}
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/ready
              port: {{ .Values.router.service.targetPort }}
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: agentcube-router
  labels:
    app: agentcube-router
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.router.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.router.service.port }}
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    app: agentcube-router

ARG TARGETARCH
FROM golang:1.24.9-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY cmd/ ./cmd/
COPY pkg/ ./pkg/
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=$TARGETARCH go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o workloadmanager ./cmd/workload-manager

FROM alpine:3.19
RUN apk --no-cache add ca-certificates && \
    adduser -D -u 1000 apiserver
USER 1000
COPY --from=builder /app/workloadmanager /app/workloadmanager
EXPOSE 8080
ENTRYPOINT ["/app/workloadmanager"]
CMD ["--port=8080"]

input.content:
ARG TARGETARCH
FROM golang:1.24.9-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY cmd/ ./cmd/
COPY pkg/ ./pkg/
COPY client-go/ ./client-go/
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=$TARGETARCH go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o agentcube-router ./cmd/router

FROM alpine:3.19
RUN apk --no-cache add ca-certificates && \
    adduser -D -u 1000 router
USER 1000
COPY --from=builder /app/agentcube-router /app/agentcube-router
EXPOSE 8080
ENTRYPOINT ["/app/agentcube-router"]
CMD ["--port=8080", "--debug"]

input.content:
ARG TARGETARCH
FROM golang:1.24.4 AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY cmd/ ./cmd/
COPY pkg/ ./pkg/
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=$TARGETARCH go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o picod ./cmd/picod

FROM ubuntu:24.04
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
COPY --from=builder /app/picod ./picod
EXPOSE 8080
ENTRYPOINT ["./picod"]

---
apiVersion: apiextensions.k8s.io/v1
kind: CustomResourceDefinition
metadata:
  annotations:
    controller-gen.kubebuilder.io/version: v0.16.1
  name: agentruntimes.runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh
spec:
  group: runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh
  names:
    kind: AgentRuntime
    listKind: AgentRuntimeList
    plural: agentruntimes
    singular: agentruntime
  scope: Namespaced
  versions:
    - additionalPrinterColumns:
        - jsonPath: .metadata.creationTimestamp
          name: Age
          type: date
      name: v1alpha1
      schema:
        openAPIV3Schema:
          properties:
            apiVersion:
              type: string
            kind:
              type: string
            metadata:
              type: object
            spec:
              properties:
                maxSessionDuration:
                  default: 8h
                  type: string
                podTemplate:
                  properties:
                    annotations:
                      additionalProperties:
                        type: string
                      type: object
                    labels:
                      additionalProperties:
                        type: string
                      type: object
                    spec:
                      type: object
                      x-kubernetes-preserve-unknown-fields: true
                  required:
                    - spec
                  type: object
                sessionTimeout:
                  default: 15m
                  type: string
                targetPort:
                  items:
                    properties:
                      name:
                        type: string
                      pathPrefix:
                        type: string
                      port:
                        format: int32
                        type: integer
                      protocol:
                        default: HTTP
                        enum:
                          - HTTP
                          - HTTPS
                        type: string
                    required:
                      - port
                    type: object
                  type: array
              required:
                - podTemplate
                - targetPort
              type: object
            status:
              properties:
                conditions:
                  items:
                    properties:
                      lastTransitionTime:
                        format: date-time
                        type: string
                      message:
                        maxLength: 32768
                        type: string
                      observedGeneration:
                        format: int64
                        minimum: 0
                        type: integer
                      reason:
                        maxLength: 1024
                        minLength: 1
                        pattern: ^[A-Za-z]([A-Za-z0-9_,:]*[A-Za-z0-9_])?$
                        type: string
                      status:
                        enum:
                          - "True"
                          - "False"
                          - Unknown
                        type: string
                      type:
                        maxLength: 316
                        pattern: ^([a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?(\.[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?)*/)?(([A-Za-z0-9][-A-Za-z0-9_.]*)?[A-Za-z0-9])$
                        type: string
                    required:
                      - lastTransitionTime
                      - message
                      - reason
                      - status
                      - type
                    type: object
                  type: array
              type: object
          required:
            - spec
          type: object
      served: true
      storage: true
      subresources:
        status: {}

---
apiVersion: apiextensions.k8s.io/v1
kind: CustomResourceDefinition
metadata:
  annotations:
    controller-gen.kubebuilder.io/version: v0.16.1
  name: codeinterpreters.runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh
spec:
  group: runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh
  names:
    kind: CodeInterpreter
    listKind: CodeInterpreterList
    plural: codeinterpreters
    singular: codeinterpreter
  scope: Namespaced
  versions:
    - additionalPrinterColumns:
        - jsonPath: .metadata.creationTimestamp
          name: Age
          type: date
        - jsonPath: .status.ready
          name: Ready
          type: boolean
      name: v1alpha1
      schema:
        openAPIV3Schema:
          properties:
            apiVersion:
              type: string
            kind:
              type: string
            metadata:
              type: object
            spec:
              properties:
                authMode:
                  default: picod
                  enum:
                    - picod
                    - none
                  type: string
                maxSessionDuration:
                  default: 8h
                  type: string
                ports:
                  items:
                    properties:
                      name:
                        type: string
                      pathPrefix:
                        type: string
                      port:
                        format: int32
                        type: integer
                      protocol:
                        default: HTTP
                        enum:
                          - HTTP
                          - HTTPS
                        type: string
                    required:
                      - port
                    type: object
                  type: array
                sessionTimeout:
                  default: 15m
                  type: string
                template:
                  properties:
                    annotations:
                      additionalProperties:
                        type: string
                      type: object
                    labels:
                      additionalProperties:
                        type: string
                      type: object
                    spec:
                      type: object
                      x-kubernetes-preserve-unknown-fields: true
                  required:
                    - spec
                  type: object
                warmPoolSize:
                  format: int32
                  type: integer
              required:
                - template
              type: object
            status:
              properties:
                conditions:
                  items:
                    properties:
                      lastTransitionTime:
                        format: date-time
                        type: string
                      message:
                        maxLength: 32768
                        type: string
                      observedGeneration:
                        format: int64
                        minimum: 0
                        type: integer
                      reason:
                        maxLength: 1024
                        minLength: 1
                        pattern: ^[A-Za-z]([A-Za-z0-9_,:]*[A-Za-z0-9_])?$
                        type: string
                      status:
                        enum:
                          - "True"
                          - "False"
                          - Unknown
                        type: string
                      type:
                        maxLength: 316
                        pattern: ^([a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?(\.[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?)*/)?(([A-Za-z0-9][-A-Za-z0-9_.]*)?[A-Za-z0-9])$
                        type: string
                    required:
                      - lastTransitionTime
                      - message
                      - reason
                      - status
                      - type
                    type: object
                  type: array
                ready:
                  type: boolean
              type: object
          required:
            - spec
          type: object
      served: true
      storage: true
      subresources:
        status: {}

todos.content: AR-001: Implement CI/CD GitHub workflows (11 files)
AR-003: Implement Helm chart, Dockerfiles, Makefile
AR-004: Implement Dify plugin and PCAP analyzer
AR-008: Implement Workload Manager files
AR-011: Implement client-go generated code
Create hack/update-codegen.sh script

input.content:
.PHONY: all build generate gen-crd gen-client gen-all gen-check build-router build-agentd build-all docker-build docker-buildx-push docker-build-router docker-buildx-push-router docker-build-picod docker-buildx-push-picod lint test e2e e2e-clean gen-copyright

IMAGE_REGISTRY ?= ghcr.io/volcano-sh
TAG ?= latest

all: build

generate:
	controller-gen object path="./pkg/apis/..." output:dir="./pkg/apis"
	$(MAKE) gen-crd
	go mod tidy

gen-crd:
	controller-gen crd path="./pkg/apis/..." output:dir="./manifests/charts/base/crds"

gen-client:
	./hack/update-codegen.sh

gen-all: generate gen-client

gen-check: gen-all
	git diff --exit-code

build:
	go build -o bin/workloadmanager ./cmd/workload-manager

build-router:
	go build -o bin/agentcube-router ./cmd/router

build-agentd:
	go build -o bin/agentd ./cmd/agentd

build-picod:
	go build -o bin/picod ./cmd/picod

build-all: build build-router build-agentd build-picod

docker-build:
	docker build -t $(IMAGE_REGISTRY)/workloadmanager:$(TAG) -f docker/Dockerfile .

docker-buildx-push:
	docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 --push -t $(IMAGE_REGISTRY)/workloadmanager:$(TAG) -f docker/Dockerfile .

docker-build-router:
	docker build -t $(IMAGE_REGISTRY)/agentcube-router:$(TAG) -f docker/Dockerfile.router .

docker-buildx-push-router:
	docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 --push -t $(IMAGE_REGISTRY)/agentcube-router:$(TAG) -f docker/Dockerfile.router .

docker-build-picod:
	docker build -t $(IMAGE_REGISTRY)/picod:$(TAG) -f docker/Dockerfile.picod .

docker-buildx-push-picod:
	docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 --push -t $(IMAGE_REGISTRY)/picod:$(TAG) -f docker/Dockerfile.picod .

lint:
	golangci-lint run ./...

test:
	go test -v ./...

e2e:
	./test/e2e/run_e2e.sh

e2e-clean:
	kind delete cluster

gen-copyright:
	@echo "Generating copyright headers..."

version: 0.0.2
type: plugin
author: volcano-sh
name: agentcube
label:
  en_US: AgentCube
  zh_Hans: AgentCube
description:
  en_US: AgentCube Code Interpreter for AI Agents
  zh_Hans: AgentCube AI 代理代码解释器
icon: icon.svg
icon_dark: icon_dark.svg
resource:
  memory: 268435456
  permission:
    tool: true
    model: false
    llm: false
    vector_model: false
    text_embedding: false
    rerank: false
    tts: false
    speech2text: false
    clarify: false
plugins:
  tools:
    - provider/agentcube.yaml
meta:
  arch:
    - amd64
    - arm64
  runner:
    language: python
    version: "3.12"
    entrypoint: main

    en_US: Execute code in a sandboxed environment
    zh_Hans: 在沙箱环境中执行代码
parameters:
  - name: router_url
    type: string
    required: true
    label:
      en_US: Router URL
      zh_Hans: Router URL
    human_description:
      en_US: The URL of the AgentCube Router
      zh_Hans: AgentCube Router 的 URL
    llm_description: The URL of the AgentCube Router for connecting to the sandbox
    form: llm
  - name: workload_manager_url
    type: string
    required: true
    label:
      en_US: Workload Manager URL
      zh_Hans: Workload Manager URL
    human_description:
      en_US: The URL of the AgentCube Workload Manager
      zh_Hans: AgentCube Workload Manager 的 URL
    llm_description: The URL of the AgentCube Workload Manager for creating sandboxes
    form: llm
  - name: language
    type: select
    required: false
    default: python
    options:
      - value: python
        label:
          en_US: Python
          zh_Hans: Python
      - value: javascript
        label:
          en_US: JavaScript
          zh_Hans: JavaScript
      - value: typescript
        label:
          en_US: TypeScript
          zh_Hans: TypeScript
    label:
      en_US: Language
      zh_Hans: 语言
    human_description:
      en_US: Programming language to execute
      zh_Hans: 要执行的编程语言
    llm_description: The programming language to execute code in
    form: llm
  - name: code
    type: string
    required: false
    label:
      en_US: Code
      zh_Hans: 代码
    human_description:
      en_US: Code to execute
      zh_Hans: 要执行的代码
    llm_description: The code to execute in the sandbox
    form: llm
  - name: command
    type: string
    required: false
    label:
      en_US: Command
      zh_Hans: 命令
    human_description:
      en_US: Shell command to execute
      zh_Hans: 要执行的 Shell 命令
    llm_description: A shell command to execute instead of code
    form: llm
  - name: session_id
    type: string
    required: false
    label:
      en_US: Session ID
      zh_Hans: Session ID
    human_description:
      en_US: Existing session ID to reuse
      zh_Hans: 要重用的现有 Session ID
    llm_description: An existing session ID to reuse for subsequent operations
    form: llm
  - name: session_reuse
    type: boolean
    required: false
    default: false
    label:
      en_US: Reuse Session
      zh_Hans: 重用 Session
    human_description:
      en_US: Whether to reuse the session for subsequent calls
      zh_Hans: 是否为后续调用重用 session
    llm_description: Whether to reuse the session for subsequent calls
    form: llm
  - name: code_interpreter_id
    type: string
    required: false
    label:
      en_US: Code Interpreter ID
      zh_Hans: Code Interpreter ID
    human_description:
      en_US: The name of the CodeInterpreter CR
      zh_Hans: CodeInterpreter CR 的名称
    llm_description: The name of the CodeInterpreter CR to use
    form: llm
